outfit_info.outfit_description: A relaxed, layered ensemble perfect for a cool evening by the sea. It features light-toned outerwear and bottoms, contrasted with a dark inner shirt and accessories. The look blends comfort with effortless style, ideal for leisurely outdoor moments at sunset.

model_attributes.body: An athletic male physique with a calm, focused demeanor, conveying a sense of mindful presence and well-being.
model_attributes.pose: A balanced, outstretched arm pose with legs apart, evoking a yoga or stretching movement, reflecting tranquility and balance.
model_attributes.background: A serene beach at sunset, with soft golden light over the ocean and clouds, enhancing a peaceful, natural vibe.
